documentation.description: Report current used cellular network status

record_types.name: Cellular_Status

fields.name: Failure_Reason
fields.description: Failure reason when status in in CELLULAR_STATUS_FLAG_FAILED

fields.name: Type_Field
fields.description: Cellular network radio type: gsm, cdma, lte...

fields.name: Quality
fields.description: Signal quality in percent. If unknown, set to UINT8_MAX

fields.name: Mcc
fields.description: Mobile country code. If unknown, set to UINT16_MAX

fields.name: Mnc
fields.description: Mobile network code. If unknown, set to UINT16_MAX

fields.name: Lac
fields.description: Location area code. If unknown, set to 0
